title: Define Radio ABC/Protocol
description: Create python/src/lichen/radio/base.py with Radio Protocol (typing.Protocol). Methods: async transmit(payload: bytes) -> bool, async receive(timeout_ms: int) -> tuple[bytes, int, int] | None (payload, rssi, snr), configure(freq_hz: int, tx_power_dbm: int) -> None. This is the interface all radio implementations must satisfy.
close_reason: Wave 2 complete. 187 tests pass, ruff clean.
